summary: The endpoint-domain-and-schema task is complete in substance. The repository has Prisma/SQLite dependencies, repo-local Prisma config, migrations, generated client setup, deterministic db preparation, idempotent protected endpoint seed defaults, generated schema documentation, and repeatability unit coverage. The implementation maps to endpoint-tool-management.md and stays inside the persistence foundation scope without adding out-of-scope UI, MCP, REST, auth, or reset behavior. I did not rerun write-producing commands in the read-only evaluator sandbox, but the supplied deterministic check record reports all mandatory gates passing.
satisfied_exit_criteria: npm run db:prepare is wired through scripts/db-prepare.mjs to create data/, apply Prisma migrations, generate Prisma Client, and run endpoint seed defaults.

db:prepare repeatability is covered by tests/unit/db-prepare.test.ts, which runs the command twice against an isolated SQLite database and verifies singular seeded endpoint, parameter, and response-case rows.

prisma/schema.prisma represents immutable endpoint IDs, endpoint names, titles/descriptions, enabled state, delete codes, default responses, timestamps, ordered parameters, response cases, and endpoint/case failure configuration fields.
docs/generated/db-schema.md matches the implemented Endpoint, EndpointParam, and ResponseCase persistence shape and documents the preparation behavior and seed defaults.
The required gates are recorded as passing: npm run db:prepare, npm run test:unit, and npm run verify.
